name: Live Oak
notes: Strong shade tree for large landscapes, driveways, and ranch-style properties.

name: Cedar Elm
notes: Hardy option with good drought tolerance and a clean upright shape.

name: Texas Red Oak
notes: Great color and strong specimen presence for larger residential landscapes.

name: Bur Oak
notes: Big, impressive tree for customers wanting a long-term statement tree.

name: Desert Willow
notes: Smaller ornamental option with seasonal blooms and low-water appeal.

name: Monterrey Oak
notes: Clean, dependable shade tree option for modern landscapes.
